items.title: I'm planning to go to Japan (again!) in December and this time I asked Codex to use the b…

items.description: I'm planning to go to Japan (again!) in December and this time I asked Codex to use the browser to navigate Google Flights and individual hotel websites, find and save all the prices, give me the direct booking links on the dates that I wa…
items.description_zh: 我计划在 12 月（再次！）去日本，这次我要求 Codex 使用浏览器导航 Google 航班和各个酒店网站，查找并保存所有价格，为我提供我旅行日期的直接预订链接。
